programme.title: Collision Course
programme.desc: Kate Parks' flight home experiences a solar flare catastrophe, incapacitating pilots and disabling systems. With her piloting skills tested, she must land the plane safely to reunite with her daughter Samantha.

programme.title: Mommy Would Never Hurt You
programme.desc: Riley wants nothing more than to rebuild her estranged relationship with her mother and little sister, who are shut-ins due to her sister's illness. But when Riley realizes her sister may not actually be as sick as she appears, Riley's mother catches on, stopping at nothing to keep her daughters with her forever.

programme.title: Deadly Patient
programme.desc: Dr. Hillary Spenser is known as 'The Angel of the East Wing'. However, a patient mistakes her compassion for adoration, fuelling his obsession to do whatever it takes to fulfil his misguided vision of their future together.

programme.title: Sommersby
programme.desc: A farmer returns home from the Civil War, but his wife begins to suspect that the man is an impostor.

programme.title: Zulu (1964)
programme.desc: Outnumbered British soldiers do battle with Zulu warriors at Rorke's Drift.

programme.title: The Mambo Kings
programme.desc: Two Cuban brothers bring a new music to 1950s USA. They are as different as the problems that await them.

programme.title: A Birthmother's Secret
programme.desc: A woman starts to worry when her adopted daughter's biological mother comes back into the picture and begins acting more and more unpredictably. AKA Birthmother's Betrayal.

programme.title: A Handful of Dust
programme.desc: The wife's affair and a death in the family hasten the demise of an upper-class English marriage.

programme.title: Back to Love
programme.desc: A young widow returns home for the first time in three years to help prepare her sister's wedding. She is forced to confront her past, including the man she never expected to fall for.

programme.title: The Wedding Ring
programme.desc: Kate Sterling’s entire life is about proposals. As a jewelry designer she’s created rings for more happy couples than she can count, however none for herself yet. At her sister's marriage, Kate is given a second change to connect with her childhood sweetheart. Now she has to decide whether their feelings have changed, or if the wedding will re-kindle the sparks that once united them; giving Kate the ring she's been waiting for her whole life.

programme.title: The Sundowners
programme.desc: In Australia's Outback during the early twentieth century, the impoverished Carmody family lives a nomadic life out of their wagon, but the mom and son want to settle, while the dad is against it.

programme.title: Blackbeard Part One
programme.desc: In 1717, Royal Navy Lieutenant Robert Maynard is sent to the West Indies on a secret mission to destroy notorious pirate ship The Queen Anne's Revenge and its crew.
